question_text: How many provinces are full members of the Covenant of Varkaar?
When did Eelan province accept protection under the Articles of Borded?
How does the Covenant of Varkaar function?
What is the role of the Varkaar Council?
expected_answer: Set policy on defense, foreign relations and trade.

question_text: What is the Great Ring Road?
expected_answer: An irregular circuit connecting major towns of the Saskan Lands.

question_text: What are the Articles of Borded?
expected_answer: The core agreements between companies of the Varkaar Arms.

question_text: In what era did the Eelani-Futanik War occur?
expected_answer: In the 15th century after the arrival.
The official courier service of the Varkaar Arms.

question_text: What is the Cann of Borded?
expected_answer: Military commanders, town administrators and provincial managers.
